states.name: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
states.notes: Standard ECI code per published Statistical Reports. Merged UT since 26 January 2020 (previously separate UTs Dadra & Nagar Haveli on U03 and Daman & Diu on U04). The historical U04 slot may have been retained for Lakshadweep continuity; reconciliation pending. Live URL probe pending.

states.name: Lakshadweep
states.notes: Standard ECI code per published Statistical Reports. Live URL probe pending.

states.name: NCT of Delhi
states.notes: U05 confirmed via /api/get-ac-election-state 2025 cycle. National Capital Territory under the Government of NCT of Delhi Act, 1991.

states.name: Puducherry
states.notes: Live partywise URL family with U07 segment confirmed for Puducherry on the May 2026 portal AND via /api/get-ac-election-state 2026 cycle. Note: older ECI Statistical Reports list Puducherry under the U06 segment; the post-2019 reorganisation appears to have renumbered the UT namespace. The U06 row is intentionally omitted from this file pending reconciliation; do not add it without a live probe.

states.name: Jammu and Kashmir
states.notes: U08 confirmed via /api/get-ac-election-state 2024 cycle. Reorganised from former state S09 into UTs U08 (Jammu and Kashmir) and U09 (Ladakh) on 31 October 2019 under the Jammu and Kashmir Reorganisation Act, 2019.

states.name: Ladakh
states.notes: Standard ECI code per published Statistical Reports post-2019. Created 31 October 2019 from former state S09 alongside U08. Live URL probe pending.
